title: useDialog Options Configuration
description: Configuration object passed to the useDialog() hook in es-plus-ui

width.description: Dialog width (CSS value or number in px)

maxHeight.description: Maximum height for dialog body content area

key.description: Unique identifier. Same key reuses dialog instance

render.description: Content render function. Signature: (h, { registerRef, getRefs }, components) => VNode

renderHeader.description: Header render function. Signature: (h, instance) => VNode

renderFooter.description: Footer render function. Signature: (h, instance) => VNode

configBtn.description: Footer action buttons. Click signature: (currentRef, { close, getRefs, dialogInstance }) => void

isDraggable.description: Enable drag to move the dialog

hiddenFullBtn.description: Hide the fullscreen toggle button in header

closeOnClickModal.description: Close dialog when clicking the overlay mask

closeOnPressEscape.description: Close dialog when pressing ESC key

showClose.description: Show the close button in header

loading.description: Show loading state on the dialog

customClass.description: Custom CSS class for the dialog

appendTo.description: CSS selector or HTMLElement for dialog mount target

lockScroll.description: Lock page scroll when dialog is open

onlyInstance.description: Singleton mode: reuses one dialog instance, updates content on subsequent calls

confirmText.description: Custom text for the confirm button

cancelText.description: Custom text for the cancel button

onClosed.description: Callback fired after dialog is fully closed
